'''âw-b-l-m''' ('''kawablemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:languish|languish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-b-l-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:languish|languish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-b-l-m
|-
! Lemma
| kawablemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwablemoko|thiwablemoko]] || [[word:jiwablemoko|jiwablemoko]] || [[word:shiwablemoko|shiwablemoko]] || [[word:kiwablemoko|kiwablemoko]]
|-

|-

|-
